name: CLL Post-BTKi
note: 71-year-old male with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL), del(17p) confirmed by FISH. Progressed on ibrutinib after 18 months of therapy. No prior venetoclax. ECOG PS 1. Creatinine clearance 58 mL/min. Platelet count 95,000. No active autoimmune disease. No transformation to Richter syndrome confirmed on biopsy.
notes: High-risk CLL post-BTKi. Key candidates: venetoclax-based trials, PI3K inhibitors, bispecific antibody trials.
